A Quantum Error-Correcting Perspective on Objectivity
Using operator algebra quantum error correction we provide a new way to understand objectivity that recovers previous approaches and goes beyond.

title: Marin Girard
text:
Quantum foundations · Quantum information · Emergence . Quantum Error correction


I like quantum stuff.

I am a PhD student in physics at Virginia Tech working on quantum foundations, quantum error correction and the emergence of space from quantum.
This site is about my current research directions, selected papers, and CV.
